titleStmt.title: SII 25.66: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 66. (A.R. No. 66 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the prākāra of the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
The details of the date of the record viz., Viḷambi, Mēsha śu. 12, Uttiram, Wednesday regularly correspond to 1538 A.D., April 10, f.d.t. 13 f.d.n. 32.

This incomplete inscription seem to record some gift by the adhikāri Tikkana-nāyaka for conducting a festival called pallakku-sēvai (Palanquin procession) for the deity Tiruvayaṉīśuram-uḍaiyār of Vaḻugūr alias Kalikaḍindaśōḻanallūr in Chalukkip-paṟṟu in Irumbēḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟakkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is said that the above gift was made for the merit of one Kāḷattirājaiyaṉ, son of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Iḷaṅgaiyadēvaśōḻa-mahārājaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍa le
śvaran metini mīcaṟakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri sāḷu
va rācātirāca rācaparamecuvara pāṣaikku
ttappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭa
ṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nā
ṭu kuṭātāṉ pūrvvatekṣiṇa paccima Utta
ra catuścamuttirātipati śrīvirapratāya naraciṅ
katevakumāṟan Accutaiyateva mahārā
yar piṟitivi rācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉ
ṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 9 10-n mel cel
lā niṉṟa Eviḷampi samvatsarattu
kku cellum viḷampi samvatsara
ttu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu tu
vāteciyum Uttiramum peṟṟa putavāra
ttu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭa
lattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu Iru
m peṭunāṭṭu caḷukkipaṟṟu kalikaṭi
nta coḻanallūrāṉa vaḻukūr Ā
r tiruvayanicuramuṭaiya na
koyil pallakkuc cervaikku
mahāmaṇḍaleśvara Ilaṅ
kayateva coḻa mahārācayaṉ kumārar kāḷa
tti ṟācaiyaṉ taṉmamāka Atikāriy tikka
ma nāyakkaṉ Eḻuntaruḷappaṇṇuvikkai yi
l Inta Ū vattukku muṉṉāḷIncomplete. There are two unconnected pieces probably belonging to this record. They run as follows:
A
1 • vanta māṉṉiyam taṅka
2 • tirumuṉ amutupaṭi •••
3 • caya tiruppaticuraā • 5 •
4 • 5 10 kaivittā • •gha •
5 ku5 10 aṭai ••••• �
6 ntāviḷakkukku rūpāy2 100
7 ••• tiru ••• m •• ṟku
B
1 tevaraṭiyāṟ[ku] na-
2 iṟṟaināḷ vi-
3 • 100 āḻvāṟku-
4 āti te[va*]npa[ṭṭa]ṟku
5 cu ••• yakkāṟaṉukku
6 tu kku • 5 100 9 •
7 • kāṟanukku •••
Digital edition of SII 25.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
